svg.aria-label: April week 1 2026 weekly rollup covering 5 daily security digests : TrueConf CVE-2026-3502 zero-day APT against Southeast Asia governments, Axios npm supply chain breach with DPRK attribution, device-code phishing surges 37x, AWS Landing Zone Accelerator universal config, Android developer verification rollout.
svg.title: 2026-04 Week 1 rollup: TrueConf 0-day, Axios npm, AWS LZA ISO 27001

g.text: DPRK-linked actor : device code phishing 37x surge
TrueChaos campaign : SEA government targets : MitM RCE
Continuous compliance via Config + Security Hub + CloudTrail
